hda8689e9g0fa8g4991g92afgff6ce7f23f4f: Lads, for the love of all that is holy, I've never clapped eyes on your poor sister.
hb9047033g18bfg437dgb52dg4bd43c3280fc: Drop the act, hag. You was the last to see Mayrina.
h1ee879ebgce84g4e4dg9ccdg0e61bff89e73: You there! Please, I don't know what's come over these boys. I just want to go home.
h54d78deagff3bg4164g83c2g4835f5c6459d: *The old woman's face creases with false concern. You realise she's lying about seeing this girl, Mayrina.*
h037a6b35g7769g4827ga9aag86ec6ebd2dfe: Stop this! We... we won't ask again.
hf7944ffdg2431g4bf9gbacag770040c716ab: Stop! An illusion covers this swamp - who's reponsible?
hbfeaa442gc65dg4efega4d7g4802860bfc1e: Wait - what? You saw through my magic?
h1d30d347g8abag4cdega5a2g342becb5cacb: How about you all just calm down. What's going on here?
h2704164bgaa13g496cg9327g1b40f661c427: Careful! Don't trust a word out of her mouth. Our sister went to the hag, and we ain't seen her since.
h62b0ccf3g52a5g43abga277ga57c3e90a0fc: Hand over heart, I don't know their sister. I will gladly help you all look for her though.
h8cd6bfc5gdbc1g41e7gb65agfe7f7f10e7bf: I won't let you hurt Auntie Ethel.
hb4265aeagd0a4g4634gb055g3ab15e8a321d: I won't let you hurt this woman.
hccc2e64dgc01cg4e88ga0f1gb3c40c56bbc2: Ethel, what did you do to their sister?
h7a0c4a0dga548g4f23g82c1gccd58fa34f3f: You were supposed to rush to my defence, love. Fat lot of good you are.
h01c6fe3bg59f2g468bga722gb6988d3f610b: Some advice? You ever darken my door, you'd best have that head bowed and an apology at the ready.
hdb354563gfa3dg4840g879fg003259ee2e14: Tell the truth - what did you do to their sister?
h7d1c9c87g0862g4f30g96f7gac5ad314ff12: Lower your weapons, I know this lady.
h83bc018fg4ec0g429cgb893gcc942f33f702: Don't bloody stand there gaping, get him!
he64068abgbf5cg46fag8740gaadae81b2aa4: Don't bloody stand there gaping, get her!
hb3a4406cg1225g4b68gbb41g77d66c2f3ba8: Lower your weapons, she's just an old woman.
h77ba4b0dg9fd3g4cc4g935agdbc4e794df6d: You're lying; you have seen this girl.
hc9105eecgee76g4af1g9e59g2f004c521b28: This is nothing to do with me. Goodbye.
hef359f16gb106g482cg9f56g77c9e91b71de: *Auntie Ethel's face creases with false concern. You realise she's lying about seeing this girl, Mayrina.*
h825afc70gfc0ag40dagb6c5gb3e7fac10ad7: Thank goodness you're here, sweetie. I-I don't know what's come over these boys.
